name: Kindergarten Robotics & Electronics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for inputs, outputs, safe battery awareness, and robot directions. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with inputs, outputs, safe battery awareness, and robot directions.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: inputs, outputs, safe battery awareness, and robot directions
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about inputs, outputs, safe battery awareness, and robot directions through a close look at inputs, outputs, safe battery awareness, and robot directions.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about inputs, outputs, safe battery awareness, and robot directions through a guided practice with inputs, outputs, safe battery awareness, and robot directions.
